title: Active Image (ImgSelect)
text: Active Image (ImgSelect) The image that is displayed when the button, tab, or menu item is selected. " ImgSelect = @ ImageFile | ^ GlyphName " Usage Dynamic? Yes Supported in Grid? No Dependencies: For widgets, Default Image must be set. For command buttons, Representation must be set to Uniface . Setting in ProcScript You can use $properties or $fieldproperties to set or get the property and its value. For more information, see the "$properties and "$fieldproperties" topics. $fieldproperties(FLD1) = "ImgDefault=@filesave.png ; ImgSelect=@filesave_sel.png" Copy Setting for Menus For menus, this property can only be set in the application initialization file and applies to all menus. If ImgSelect is set, it overrides the BackColorSelect property. In usys.ini : [application] menu=umenu(ForeColor=black;ImgSelect=@yellow.png) Copy Applies To CommandButton utabex (TabEx) Menu Objects Related Links Default Image (ImgDefault) The image that is displayed as the button or tab. Representation This property determines the appearance of the command button when running on the Microsoft Windows operating system (XP and later versions). One of Windows (default), Uniface, or Header. $properties Return or set the current widget properties of a field. $fieldproperties Return or set the current widget properties of an instance of a field.
